name: 双持贝瑞塔 | 蔷薇珠母
nameZh: 双持贝瑞塔 | 蔷薇珠母
descriptionEn: Firing two large-mag Berettas at once will lower accuracy and increase load times. On the bright side, you'll get to fire two large-mag Berettas at once. The metal of these Dual Berettas has been painted rose gold and the grips are a nacred, deep jade color. You can't make an omelette without cracking a few jeweled eggs
descriptionZh: 两把具有大弹匣的贝瑞塔同时开火会降低精准度，并增加换弹时间。不过你得往好处想，这不，别人只有一把枪，而你可以同时用两把贝瑞塔射个痛快。 这把双持贝瑞塔的金属部分被涂装成了玫瑰金，握把则是带有珍珠光泽的深玉色。 舍不得孩子套不住狼
